summary: M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-CLIENT-001 is closed because PR #229 passed Quality/Web/Browser Smoke and Windows Desktop Smoke Artifact, merged into origin/main, and local main synchronized to ad93aab15a95911a493dc8b1d8795595bc5d2684. The player-facing map now consumes topology-backed district polygons, explicit route polylines, route-node anchors, and anti-grid proof tests instead of hidden rectangular/grid/lattice authority. Formal M7 content lock remains blocked until M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-VALIDATION-001 validates the recovery and the product owner reconsiders it.

tests_run.result: Local full test command passed after CI hash metric fix.
Formatting, lint, typecheck, and architecture checks passed.
No whitespace errors before CI fix commit.
Quality/Web/Browser Smoke passed in 2m40s; Windows Desktop Smoke Artifact passed in 51s.
PR #229 merged into main as ad93aab15a95911a493dc8b1d8795595bc5d2684.

qa_incremental_ci_fix.source: multi_agent.wait_agent response after CI fix commit 5764849c; no separate qa_reviewer-authored file was created
qa_incremental_ci_fix.summary: QA confirmed the post-review CI fix only restores the shell State hash metric, does not weaken tests, does not touch forbidden paths, and does not reintroduce hidden grid/lattice or fake routes.
commands: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/deterministic-hash.test.ts

decisions.decision: CLOSED only after PR #229 entered origin/main and local main synchronized to ad93aab15a95911a493dc8b1d8795595bc5d2684.
Default player-facing map now consumes accepted M7 topology read models and explicit route polylines; renderer-only route guessing remains disallowed.
Do not reopen or approve M7 content lock from this closure; M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-VALIDATION-001 must validate topology recovery first.

risks.summary: Formal M7 content lock remains blocked until topology validation and product-owner reconsideration.
M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-VALIDATION-001 must still prove anti-grid/lattice behavior, deterministic path previews, screenshot/manual smoke, and console cleanliness end to end.

requested_action: Synchronize closure to main and start M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-VALIDATION-001.
